Welcome to Tao's blog

Technical Writer in San Jose

Latest Posts

  • A peek into HTML, XML, XHTML, JSON, and Markdown April 23, 2016 HTMLHTML is a standard markup language designed for creating web pages. The initial HTML 1 was released in 1991 and the most current version is HTML 5.
  • AI and middle class jobs April 17, 2016 Recently I started to ponder upon artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning and how they are impacting our lives. The more books and online postings I read, the more I get concerned about the future job perspectives and quality of life we and our kids will be facing.
  • My resume in LaTex April 09, 2016 I finally decided to give LaTex a try as a tool for resume writing. I got some templates from the Internet and played around. The result is quite acceptable.
  • Jupyter/iPython Notebook page with LaTex syntax April 01, 2016 The content below is converted from an iPython Notebook format to Markdown. It is purely for testing purposes to see whether the formulas can be displayed properly.
  • Apache Spark March 28, 2016 I started to poke around Apache Spark and was amazed how easy to get it running. The issue I am having is how to configure Ipython/Jupyter to work with Spark in Windows. I followed some instructions but so far got a Kernel error when I try to use Spark in Ipython notebook.
  • Jekyll _site folder March 03, 2016 I started to use Jekyll yesterday to host my blog. One thing that tricked me was the files in the _site folder are not supposed to be edited. I made some changes trying to update some footer and adding some stuff but my changes kept being wiped away. I wish I knew this earlier. :-)
  • Hello from Tao March 01, 2016 Hello, This is Tao from San Jose. This is my first blog. Today my daughter got notified that she would be tested for her French level next Monday. She started to get worried and now she is picking up her French books trying to catch up :-)
